insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[lines] AS target USING ( SELECT #{line.letter} AS letter, #{line.nameZhTw} AS name_zh_tw, #{line.nameEn} AS name_en, #{line.color} AS color, #{line.status} AS status, #{line.updatedAt} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.letter = source.letter WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name_zh_tw = source.name_zh_tw, name_en = source.name_en, color = source.color, status = source.status, updated_at = source.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (letter, name_zh_tw, name_en, color, status, updated_at) VALUES (source.letter, source.name_zh_tw, source.name_en, source.color, source.status, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, letter, name_zh_tw, name_en, color, status, updated_at FROM [dbo].[lines] ORDER BY id ASC

insert.foreach: MERGE [dbo].[stations] AS target USING ( SELECT #{station.nameZhTw} AS name_zh_tw, #{station.nameEn} AS name_en, #{station.status} AS status, #{station.atm} AS atm, #{station.nursingRoom} AS nursing_room, #{station.diaperTable} AS diaper_table, #{station.chargingStation} AS charging_station, #{station.ticketMachine} AS ticket_machine, #{station.drinkingWater} AS drinking_water, #{station.restroom} AS restroom, #{station.updatedAt} AS updated_at ) AS source ON target.name_zh_tw = source.name_zh_tw WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET name_en = source.name_en, status = source.status, atm = source.atm, nursing_room = source.nursing_room, diaper_table = source.diaper_table, charging_station = source.charging_station, ticket_machine = source.ticket_machine, drinking_water = source.drinking_water, restroom = source.restroom, updated_at = source.updated_at WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (name_zh_tw, name_en, status, atm, nursing_room, diaper_table, charging_station, ticket_machine, drinking_water, restroom, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (source.name_zh_tw, source.name_en, source.status, source.atm, source.nursing_room, source.diaper_table, source.charging_station, source.ticket_machine, source.drinking_water, source.restroom, source.updated_at, source.updated_at);

mapper.select: SELECT id, name_zh_tw, name_en, status, atm, nursing_room, diaper_table, charging_station, ticket_machine, locker, drinking_water, restroom, created_at, updated_at FROM [dbo].[stations] ORDER BY id ASC
